name: io.github.blockchainacademics/mcp
description: Canonical crypto MCP — news, entities, academy corpus, proprietary indicators. Wraps api.blockchainacademics.com with attribution envelope on every tool response.

environment_variables.name: BCA_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: BCA API key from api.blockchainacademics.com — free tier issues 2,000 calls/month with mandatory attribution. Get one at https://blockchainacademics.com (dev console launching Q2 2026; contact dev@blockchainacademics.com for early access).

environment_variables.name: BCA_API_BASE
environment_variables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://api.blockchainacademics.com. Only set when testing against staging.

tools.name: search_news
tools.description: Full-text search across 3,501+ BCA editorial articles. Filters: topic, entity, date range, tier.

tools.name: get_entity
tools.description: Canonical entity dossier (chain / project / person / ticker / protocol / exchange / fund) with alias folding.

tools.name: get_explainer
tools.description: Academy lesson content — 43 lessons across 9 full courses, markdown + Lexical body + lesson metadata.
